fixes.origin:
script = (
    "DELETE FROM sessions "
    "WHERE last_seen < '" + before_iso + "' "
    "AND status = '" + status + "';"
)

cur.executescript(script)
fixes.replacement:
statement = (
    "DELETE FROM sessions "
    "WHERE last_seen < ? "
    "AND status = ?"
)

cur.execute(statement, (before_iso, status))
